description: Music, theatre, dance, performance, production and creative stage careers.

careers.name: Actor
careers.overview: Actor creates live, recorded or staged artistic experiences through performance, music, theatre, movement and production.
careers.whyChoose: Actor is useful because it suits creative students who want expression, performance, audience connection and portfolio-led growth.
careers.eligibility: Class 12 in any stream; auditions, portfolios or performance training may be required.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 -> Performing arts degree/diploma/training -> Portfolio/auditions -> Stage, studio or teaching role.
careers.workEnvironment: Theatres, studios, music labels, production houses, cultural organizations, schools and freelance projects.
careers.futureScope: Strong for digital performance, entertainment, cultural education, events and creator-led careers.
careers.aiImpact: AI will support editing and production while performance, originality and stage presence remain human strengths.
cons: Early career may need portfolio or training
